listing.title: FlexiSpot E7 standing desk
listing.why_ranked: A reply from this seller helps negotiate the better desk.

conversation.text: Hi Maya — interested in the FlexiSpot. Would $195 work for pickup before Friday?

conversation.speaker: Maya
conversation.text: Yes, $195 works if you can come by Thursday evening.

next_move.headline: Goti's next move
next_move.plain_english: Maya already accepted $195. Lock the pickup window so Uplift can be used as leverage.
next_move.draft: Thanks Maya — Thursday at 6pm works. I'll bring cash. See you then.
next_move.listing_summary: FlexiSpot E7 standing desk · Nextdoor · asking $220
